creator: hybridx87@gmail.com
text:
You didn't understand me (i know my english is bad). I probably forget
reboot computer (after install new kernel), after writing
"snd_maestro3_load="YES "" in "/boot/loader.conf" and reboot. Gnome
Setting Deamon - don't start, only show error; " Message did not
receive a reply (timeout by message bus)", and if run 2 copy xmms,
sound is bad, on tty is;

pcm0:play:2:dsp0.2: play interrupt timeout, channel dead

# sysctl -a | grep snd
hw.snd.report_soft_formats: 1
hw.snd.targetirqrate: 32
hw.snd.verbose: 1
hw.snd.maxautovchans: 4
hw.snd.unit: 0
hw.snd.pcm0.buffersize: 4096
hw.snd.pcm0.vchans: 4
hw.snd.pcm0.hwvol_step: 5
hw.snd.pcm0.hwvol_mixer: vol

# cat /dev/sndstat
FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm)
Installed devices:
pcm0: <ESS Technology Maestro3> at io 0xec00 irq 5 kld snd_maestro3
(4p/1r/4v channels duplex default)
